explanation: The user wants to use a different cup instead of the currently held cup_0. I first place the current cup_0 on the countertop to free it. Then, I pick up a new cup, cup_1 (since it's not referenced in the discussed_objects, it is a new object), and perform all the not-attempted steps from the old plan using cup_1 instead. This includes placing it on the coffeemachine, turning it on and off, and then placing it back on the countertop.
